  "active_set": [
    "R1.6",
    "RX.1",

  "category_focus": "R1",
  "clarification_needed": false,
  "clarification_question": "",
  "rationale": {
    "R1.6": "The primary responsibility is to improve sentence-level conciseness, grammar, and flow, as the open-ended request 'Take a look' applied to this repetitive artifact most strongly implies a need for writing polish.",
    "RX.1": "The agent must be transparent about the limitations of its feedback, given the minimal context of the delegation.",
    "RX.2": "The agent must avoid overstating the severity of the writing issues or the quality of its proposed improvements.",
    "RX.3": "The agent must focus strictly on improving the writing and not comment on the scientific content of the benchmark description.",
    "RX.4": "The agent must ensure its edits for conciseness do not alter or misrepresent the technical claims being made.",
    "RX.5": "The agent must ensure that all suggested changes are traceable to the goal of improving prose quality."
  }
}

rationale.R1.6: The primary responsibility is to improve sentence-level conciseness, grammar, and flow, as the open-ended request 'Take a look' applied to this repetitive artifact most strongly implies a need for writing polish.
rationale.RX.1: The agent must be transparent about the limitations of its feedback, given the minimal context of the delegation.
rationale.RX.2: The agent must avoid overstating the severity of the writing issues or the quality of its proposed improvements.
rationale.RX.3: The agent must focus strictly on improving the writing and not comment on the scientific content of the benchmark description.
rationale.RX.4: The agent must ensure its edits for conciseness do not alter or misrepresent the technical claims being made.
rationale.RX.5: The agent must ensure that all suggested changes are traceable to the goal of improving prose quality.
